articles.title: Ahead of Market: 10 things that will decide stock market action on Monday
articles.description: Markets rallied sharply as easing US–Iran tensions and softer crude prices boosted sentiment. Sensex and Nifty surged 2%, adding Rs 10 lakh crore in market value. Broader markets outperformed, volatility eased, and technical indicators turned bullish. Analysts expect momentum to continue, with geopolitical developments and oil prices remaining key triggers.

articles.title: Trump's support in rural America slips as fuel and food prices climb, Reuters/Ipsos poll shows
articles.description: WASHINGTON, June 14 - Brian Rauch has felt the squeeze of higher gas prices on his 30-mile (50-km) drives from his home in rural Stevensville, Montana, to the doctor's office. He has also noticed food prices going up and, as an Air Force veteran, sees little rationale for the U.S.-Israeli war on Iran. Read more at straitstimes.com.
